items.title_en: Mary Jo, mother of Kardashian matriarch Kris Jenner, dies aged 91
items.title_zh: 卡戴珊女族长克里斯·詹纳的母亲玛丽·乔去世，享年 91 岁
items.desc_en: Mary Jo Campbell was featured on multiple episodes of Keeping Up with the Kardashians over the years.
items.desc_zh: 多年来，玛丽·乔·坎贝尔在《与卡戴珊同行》的多集节目中都有出演。

items.title_en: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡周围的石油管道不会消除伊朗对中东原油出口构成的威胁
items.desc_en: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，石油生产商正在建设或考虑修建新的管道项目以绕过霍尔木兹海峡，但这一基础设施仍然脆弱。

items.title_en: Alphabet shares fall on report its most powerful AI model Gemini 3.5 Pro is delayed
items.title_zh: Alphabet 股价下跌，因报告称其最强大的人工智能模型 Gemini 3.5 Pro 被推迟
items.desc_en: Alphabet announced the Gemini 3.5 Pro AI  in May, saying it was being used internally but wouldn't be ready for a broader rollout until the following month.
items.desc_zh: Alphabet 在 5 月份发布了 Gemini 3.5 Pro AI，称其正在内部使用，但要到下个月才能准备好进行更广泛的推广。

items.title_en: Two GOP senators undecided on Todd Blanche as attorney general, potentially imperiling nomination
items.title_zh: 两名共和党参议员尚未决定托德·布兰奇担任司法部长，这可能会危及提名
items.desc_en: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., wants Todd Blanche to meet with victims of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein before committing his support for the nomination.
items.desc_zh: 北卡罗来纳州共和党参议员托姆·蒂利斯希望托德·布兰奇在承诺支持提名之前会见性犯罪者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的受害者。

items.title_en: White House teleprompter operator accused of making $100k off Trump speech bets
items.title_zh: 白宫提词器操作员被指控从特朗普演讲赌注中赚取10万美元
items.desc_en: A White House staffer has been accused of using inside knowledge of speeches to make nearly $100,000 on Kalshi.
items.desc_zh: 一名白宫工作人员被指控利用演讲内幕知识在卡尔希事件上赚取近 10 万美元。

items.title_en: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
items.title_zh: 达拉斯联储主席洛根呼吁“适度”提高利率
items.desc_en: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.
items.desc_zh: 这位政策制定者表示，本周的通胀好消息还不够好。

items.title_en: Fifa 'assessing match reports' over Falklands banner
items.title_zh: 国际足联在福克兰群岛旗帜上“评估比赛报告”
items.desc_en: Fifa is "assessing the match reports" before deciding whether to punish Argentina after players held a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
items.desc_zh: 在球员们举着横幅支持阿根廷对福克兰群岛的主权主张后，国际足联正在“评估比赛报道”，然后再决定是否惩罚阿根廷。

items.title_en: Here's why the housing market is hurting so much this summer
items.title_zh: 这就是今年夏天房地产市场遭受如此严重打击的原因
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates are high, home prices at record levels and consumers stressed. These are all contributing to a drop in existing home sales and builder sentiment.
items.desc_zh: 抵押贷款利率很高，房价创历史新高，消费者压力很大。这些都导致现房销售和建筑商信心下降。

items.title_en: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over Kalshi bets allegations, White House says
items.title_zh: 白宫表示，特朗普因卡尔希赌注指控而暂停提词器操作员的职务
items.desc_en: Kalshi retained most of the profits, which were more than $90,000, from the trades made on public statements by President Trump.
items.desc_zh: 卡尔希保留了根据特朗普总统公开声明进行的交易的大部分利润，超过 9 万美元。

items.title_en: Teen hackers who live streamed cyber-attack on TfL jailed
items.title_zh: 直播伦敦交通局网络攻击的青少年黑客被判入狱
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: Eleven people die in fire at Algerian foster care home
items.title_zh: 阿尔及利亚寄养院火灾造成11人死亡
items.desc_en: Along with the fatalities, 19 people suffered injuries, the authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 当局称，除了死亡之外，还有 19 人受伤。

items.title_en: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
items.title_zh: TikTok 因儿童年龄检查面临 Ofcom 调查
items.desc_en: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.
items.desc_zh: 此前，监管机构在五月份进行了一项审查，批评该平台对儿童来说“不够安全”。

items.title_en: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
items.title_zh: 美国发起一波袭击，伊朗瞄准军事基地
items.desc_en: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.
items.desc_zh: 就在邻近的海湾国家开始报告袭击事件后不久，伊朗各地隔夜传来爆炸声。

items.title_en: Ventorah
items.title_zh: Ventorah
items.desc_en: run virtual wind tunnel aerodynamic analysis in your browser
items.desc_zh: 在浏览器中运行虚拟风洞空气动力学分析

items.title_en: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DRC forest
items.title_zh: 刚果森林中发现“隐藏”的橙色嘴唇新猴种
items.desc_en: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
items.desc_zh: 科学家们形容，看到一种很少有人知道其存在的动物的脸时会有“奇妙的感觉”。

items.desc_zh: Codex 代理的触觉控制

items.title_zh: SpaceX 股价跌破上市首日价
items.desc_en: Share trading in Elon Musk’s rocket company has been volatile since it went public a month ago.
items.desc_zh: 埃隆·马斯克的火箭公司自一个月前上市以来，其股票交易一直波动较大。

items.title_zh: The Eureka Database

items.desc_zh: 将 Reddit 投诉转化为你的下一家公司

items.desc_zh: 大声思考，看着它变成一张活生生的地图。

items.desc_zh: 将公司运营变成代理商的活地图

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew proposed for UK teens aged 16 and 17
items.title_zh: 英国提议对 16 岁和 17 岁青少年实行午夜社交媒体宵禁
items.desc_en: The government says it will improve teenagers' lives but campaigners call it a "missed opportunity".
items.desc_zh: 政府表示这将改善青少年的生活，但活动人士称这是“错失的机会”。

items.desc_zh: 通过单一提示即可建立和雇用自主人工智能员工

items.desc_zh: 将任何 3D 模型转变为可搭建的砖块模型

items.desc_zh: 每个实验室结果的私人家

items.desc_en: Surgeons remotely control two human-like robots in an operating theatre.
items.desc_zh: 外科医生在手术室中远程控制两个类人机器人。

items.desc_en: Email for AI agents. They sign up, send and reply.
items.desc_zh: AI 代理的电子邮件。他们注册、发送并回复。

items.desc_zh: 用于医疗保健分诊和护理自动化的代理人工智能

items.desc_zh: 将您的 X bio 连接到 MRR 和 GA4 以进行自动更新

items.title_zh: In Parallel MCP

items.desc_zh: 您的背景信息可供每个代理使用。

items.title_en: Cito
items.title_zh: Cito

items.desc_zh: 为代理商打造超过 2.36 亿篇论文的混合学术搜索

items.title_en: SIMPLI
items.title_zh: SIMPLI
items.desc_en: Split expenses in a live cosmos
items.desc_zh: 在生动的宇宙中分摊费用

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: Cloud Halo
items.title_zh: Cloud Halo
items.desc_en: Azure FinOps for MSPs with flat pricing
items.desc_zh: 适用于 MSP 的 Azure FinOps，定价统一

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: The impact screen time is having on younger children.
items.desc_zh: 屏幕时间对年幼的孩子有影响。

items.desc_en: Turn any goal into a personalized, adaptive learning path.
items.desc_zh: 将任何目标转变为个性化、自适应的学习路径。
